gist.headline: The hive goes to med school
gist.blurb: Viatosis just landed in the community showcase. It's a medical e-learning platform using our image generation to illustrate complex anatomy and make studying a little less painful.
gist.summary: Added Viatosis, a specialized medical e-learning platform that leverages Pollinations for AI-generated illustrations, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now discover how Viatosis uses our image API to simplify complex medical concepts for students.
gist.visual_concept: Medical education theme. Polly the bee acting as a doctor/student, examining medical imagery. A retro monitor showing an anatomical heart or brain. Nomnom creature eating medical textbooks.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny doctor's head mirror, examining a glowing retro monitor that displays a pixelated anatomical heart. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating a stack of thick medical textbooks. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
